items.description: The representation of an employee's individual employements.

hire_date.description: The employee's start day of work for an employment.

termination_date.description: The employee's last day of work for an employment.

file_new_hire_report.description: The boolean flag indicating whether Gusto will file a new hire report for the employee.

two_percent_shareholder.description: Whether the employee is a two percent shareholder of the company. This field only applies to companies with an S-Corp entity type.

employment_status.description: The employee's employment status. Supplying an invalid option will set the employment_status to *not_set*.

404.description:
Not Found

The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided UUID is valid.

schema.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided ID/UUID is valid.

error_key.description: Specifies where the error occurs. Typically this key identifies the attribute/parameter related to the error.

category.description: Specifies the type of error. The category provides error groupings and can be used to build custom error handling in your integration.

message.description: Provides details about the error - generally this message can be surfaced to an end user.

errors.message: The requested resource was not found.

schema.title: Not-Found-Error-Object
